name: mind-real-estate
description: A meditative habit visualizer. Train your mental real estate by choosing positive thoughts to clear negative ones in your brain.

scripts.build: echo 'Static site - www/ folder is the build output'
scripts.cap:init: npx cap init 'Mind Real Estate' 'com.mindrealestate.app' --web-dir www
scripts.ios: npx cap sync ios && npx cap open ios
scripts.android: npx cap sync android && npx cap open android
scripts.ios:release: npx cap sync ios && npx cap run ios --target release
scripts.android:release: npx cap sync android && cd android && ./gradlew bundleRelease

author: Mind Real Estate
